title: wave.end
description: Emitted by iterate-waves when a wave settles. The outcomes object must carry exactly the story IDs from the matching wave.start (Repeatability AC #5 — wave completeness invariant). Epic #2646 Story C — optional `totalWaves`, `startedAt`, `completedAt`, `durationMs`, and `stories[]` enrich the comment body emitted by structured-comment-poster (replaces the legacy wave-observer writer). `stories[]` carries per-story commit-assertion deltas so a reclassified `done → failed` row surfaces in the wave-end comment body.
